strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience spanning web, mobile, and embedded systems
Direct match on primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, with current AI-agent/MCP work
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, public talks and workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; Java work is from older robotics/mobile orchestration roles
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL or major cloud platforms (AWS CDK noted, but GCP/Azure and Kubernetes depth unclear beyond GISCollective)

key_factors.factor: Senior-level breadth, architecture, and testing discipline

response.justification: Candidate comfortably exceeds the 6+ years bar and hits the core TypeScript/Node/React/MongoDB stack with current, relevant AI-agent and MCP work at re:cinq. Engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, workshops) and long fullstack breadth are strong positives. Gaps are mostly framework-specific (Nest.js, Vitest) and easily ramped given the foundational skills; Kotlin/Java is secondary and recoverable. Worth interviewing to validate framework adaptability and cloud/Postgres depth.
